projectDescription: A high-performance Rust HTTP service that renders customizable card game assets (single cards, fans, and albums) from base64-encoded JSON payloads, with disk caching and parallel processing.
keyFeatures: Single card rendering with customizable frame, dye color (Oklab color space), and kindled state
Fan layout rendering — multiple rotated cards arranged in a spread
Album grid rendering — multiple cards composed into a padded grid
Disk cache: renders are saved by name and served directly on repeat requests
In-memory frame cache: common frame assets loaded once at startup to reduce disk I/O
Parallel rendering via Rayon for fan and album layouts
Base64-encoded JSON hash-based request encoding for fully reproducible renders
Configurable 5-second render timeout with graceful error responses
Response headers: X-Source (disk/rendered) and X-Processing-Time for observability
Bundled bench.js benchmark tool for load testing all three render endpoints
publicApiSurface: CardRenderRequestData { id, variant, dye, kindled, frame_type, offset_x?, offset_y?, save_name? }
